title: rubus procumbens var. roribaccus
intro: Rubus procumbens var. roribaccus, also known as the creeping raspberry, is a perennial plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus procumbens var. roribaccus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
